    DAE Diploma Programs

    3 Years Diploma

    DAE Civil Technology

    Learn construction, structural design, and site management with hands-on practical training.

    Eligibility: Matric Pass

    3 Years Diploma

    DAE Electrical Technology

    Master electrical systems, wiring, and industrial automation through practical lab sessions.

    Eligibility: Matric Pass

    2 Years

    Matric Tech

    A foundational technical program for middle-pass students to build essential practical skills.

    Eligibility: Middle Pass

    Specialized Program

    ⭐ High Demand Career

    Civil + Quantity Surveyor

    A specialized program combining civil engineering fundamentals with quantity surveying — one of the most in-demand skills in Pakistan's booming construction industry.

    🕐 Duration:  6 Months to 1 Year
    📋 Eligibility:  Matric Pass
    💼 Career:  Construction firms, real estate, government projects

    Short Courses

    3 Months

    AutoCAD

    Professional 2D/3D drafting and design software training for civil and mechanical projects.

    Eligibility: Matric Pass

    3 to 6 Months

    Industrial Electrician

    Hands-on training in industrial electrical systems, panel wiring, and safety standards.

    Eligibility: Matric / Middle

    Admission Process

    1

    Visit or Call

    Visit our campus or call us to learn about available programs and seats.

    2

    Submit Documents

    Provide your Matric Result, CNIC/B-Form, and passport-size photographs.

    3

    Pay Fee

    Submit your admission fee along with the first installment to reserve your seat.

    4

    Admission Confirmed

    Your admission is confirmed and you will receive your enrollment details.
